category_sources: Official homepage in source_facts.homepage is the upstream software page for tractorgen.
source_facts.description says it generates ASCII tractor art.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage path and source archive name use tractorgen.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official upstream page and best available documentation surface.
source_facts.source-archive is an official upstream tarball from the same vergenet.net project path.
repo_sources: No official source-control URL was present in source_facts; official distribution is the source archive at source_facts.source-archive.
tags_sources: Official upstream URLs in source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive identify the tractorgen project.
source_facts.description states ASCII tractor art generation.
